cmapss_fd001_rul.model: RULPredictor(window_size=30, rul_cap=125, backend=optuna, n_trials=30, stride=5, drop_constant_sensors=True)

hdfail_survival.dataset: Backblaze Hard Drive Failure (hdfail, 52K drives, 5 features)
hdfail_survival.note: Replaces saturated NASA Battery benchmark. 94% censoring, 5.5% failure rate. Source: frailtySurv R package (Backblaze Drive Stats). Published SOTA C=0.958 with 21 SMART features (Ahmed & Green, 2024).

smap_anomaly_detection.note: Point-adjust F1; spectral residual with z-score normalization and percentile aggregation
